messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-484 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-484" (or "reject BL-484 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A decided approval ask must close itself: strip the Approve/Amend/Reject buttons and edit the message to show the recorded verdict
What it solves: THE DEFECT. The BL-410 buttons flow records the decision (flips the ticket's human_approval field,
same effect path as a typed reply) but never touches the posted ask afterwards: the message keeps its
reply grammar and its three live buttons indefinitely. Consequences the human hit within the first…
How it works: Recording an approval strips the ask's buttons and appends the verdict to the message

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-484 - A decided approval ask must close itself: strip the Approve/Amend/Reject buttons and edit the message to show the recorded verdict is complete.
